MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LIBAH SHEPPARD's, AN INDIVIDUAL, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

An order on the mandatory Judicial Council form has been submitted as instructed in the court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Christopher C. Hite. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CCH)
